case_title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. ARDIS HAYES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, ARDIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
